data.title: ElevatePFS acquires Centauri Health Solutions' Health Systems Services division, expanding service offerings in revenue cycle management.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, in Houston, Elevate Patient Financial Solutions® (ElevatePFS), a prominent revenue cycle management partner for health systems across the country, successfully finalized the acquisition of Centauri Health Solutions' Health Systems Services division. This strategic move strengthens ElevatePFS's position in the market and enhances its service offerings. The deal marks a significant milestone for ElevatePFS, further solidifying its reputation in the industry.

data.title: CNT Foundations in South Carolina reaches milestone of 10,000 successful foundation repairs after 25 years in business.
data.description: A foundation repair company based in South Carolina, CNT Foundations, located in Charleston, SC, recently celebrated a significant milestone with the completion of 10,000 successful projects. Over a span of 25 years, the company has established itself as an expert in serving the local community and has built a strong reputation for its services.
Putin has included Moscow Mayor Sobyanin in the composition of the Russian Federation's Military-Industrial Commission, according to the decree.

data.title: New app Operation Ready by Dr. Jim Stoppani provides science-backed training for military personnel, launched Feb 16, 2026.
data.description: A renowned exercise scientist, Dr. Jim Stoppani, has recently launched a standalone mobile app called Operation Ready. This app is tailored to provide structured strength, conditioning, and performance training specifically designed for military personnel and tactical athletes. It aims to enhance the readiness of individuals in these fields. The launch took place on February 16, 2026, in Los Angeles. Operation Ready offers a comprehensive training program to optimize physical fitness and performance, catering to the specific needs of this target audience. This app is set to revolutionize training for military personnel and tactical athletes, promising significant benefits in enhancing their overall readiness.

data.title: Survey by HillFaith shows most congressional aides skeptical of Trump's third-term bid. Feb. 16, 2026. #Trump #Survey #Congress #HillFaith
data.description: On February 16, 2026, a prominent fellowship ministry for congressional staff, HillFaith, shared new data indicating that a majority of Capitol Hill workers do not expect President Donald Trump to seek a third term. The information suggests skepticism among the staff regarding Trump's intentions beyond his current term. The specific numbers from the data were not disclosed.

data.title: World Neuroscience Day Conference on Feb 21, 2026, 8:00 AM in Atlanta. Keynote: "Reuniting the Mind with the Heart." Hosted by Atlanta Neuroscience Institute and Foundation at Omni at The Battery Hotel.
data.description: Atlanta Neuroscience Institute and Foundation has revealed details about the upcoming 2026 World Neuroscience Day Conference scheduled for Saturday, February 21, 2026, at the Omni at The Battery Hotel in Atlanta, Georgia. The event will include a keynote address titled "Reuniting the Mind with the Heart," serving as the highlight of the conference. This expectedly insightful address is set to attract a significant audience keen on exploring the intersection of neuroscience and emotional intelligence. Participants across various disciplines are encouraged to attend this prestigious event, which promises to offer valuable insights into the fascinating world of neuroscience.

data.title: Global alliance of 125 organizations takes action to stop Hindu genocide in Bangladesh. Includes advocates from 15 countries.
data.description: On February 16, 2026, in Washington, an urgent appeal was issued by 125 multi-faith organizations across 15 countries through Hindus Advancing Human Rights Initiative (HAHRI), a part of HinduPACT. This global alliance includes human rights advocates and notable individuals.

data.title: Planet Fitness and BGC Canada partner for nationwide fundraiser to support communities in honor of Pink Shirt Day.
data.description: Planet Fitness has partnered with BGC Canada to aid communities nationwide through a fundraiser in honor of Pink Shirt Day.

data.title: AAAAI opposes repeal of Endangerment Finding based on scientific evidence showing greenhouse gases' impact.
data.description: The American Academy of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology (AAAAI) based in Milwaukee, on February 16, 2026, stated its opposition to repealing the Endangerment Finding. This finding relies on significant scientific data spanning decades, showcasing the role of greenhouse gas emissions in driving environmental transformations. The AAAAI stands firm against this proposal, highlighting the critical need to address these findings to tackle the escalating challenges posed by climate change.

data.title: Netrio makes CRN's MSP 500 list for 2026, also in Elite 150 category for innovation in mid-market enterprises.
data.description: Netrio, based in MCKINNEY, Texas, has recently been acknowledged in the Elite 150 group for its role in spearheading innovation and enhancing customer satisfaction for mid-market enterprises. The company, functioning as a global managed service provider (MSP), specializes in providing AI-driven IT and cybersecurity solutions. This recognition was announced on Feb. 16, 2026.

data.title: IHFA partners with Sagent, adopting Dara platform for mortgage servicing, enhancing end-to-end operations.
data.description: In Coppell, Texas on February 16, 2026, Sagent, a top supplier of mortgage servicing technology, revealed that the Idaho Housing and Finance Association (IHFA) plans to implement Dara, Sagent's comprehensive servicing platform. Dara will be utilized to support IHFA's core, consumer, and default servicing operations.

data.title: LG Pro Builder adds LG SIGNATURE to portfolio, offering design-driven appliances for homebuilders; enhances access to premium options and LG's support.
data.description: In a strategic move, LG Pro Builder broadens its offerings by incorporating LG SIGNATURE into its portfolio. This expansion enhances homebuilders' access to upscale design choices in appliances. It boosts the range of premium, design-focused appliance solutions available, all supported by LG's robust service and support network. This addition allows for greater customization and innovation in home design projects.

data.title: GreenPower Motor Company Inc. regains NASDAQ compliance, ticker GP, leading in all-electric vehicles for cargo, shuttle market.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 16, 2026, GreenPower Motor Company Inc. (NASDAQ: GP), a prominent maker and supplier of all-electric, specialized zero-emission medium and heavy-duty vehicles for cargo and delivery services, as well as shuttle operations...

data.title: Join Planet Fitness for $1 down and $15/month until Feb 27, save $28+, world's largest fitness brand.
data.description: For a limited time until February 27th, new members can save at least $28 by joining Planet Fitness for $1 down and a monthly fee of only $15. Planet Fitness, a leading fitness center operator, boasts the highest number of members compared to any other fitness brand. This offer presents a significant discount for individuals looking to join a gym.

data.title: Nathan's Famous opens new location in Tucson, Arizona bringing iconic menu to the city. A 100-year-old brand.
data.description: A well-known brand from New York is introducing its famous hot dogs, crinkle-cut fries, and full fast-casual menu to Tucson. With over 100 years of history, Nathan's Famous, Inc. from Jericho, N.Y. revealed on Feb. 16, 2026, the launch of its newest location. This iconic establishment is renowned for its classic offerings and will now cater to the Tucson community.

data.title: Near-surface, high-grade Cu-Au results at La Verde in Chilean project; potential high-grade starter pit for Costa Fuego; deeper drilling expansion.
data.description: Ongoing exploration through deeper drilling efforts has been instrumental in the growth of the high-grade core at the La Verde copper-gold porphyry discovery. The latest findings showcase near-surface, elevated-grade drill outcomes that underline the prospect of establishing a high-grade starter pit for the Costa Fuego copper-gold project in Chile. This development emphasizes the potential for significant mineral reserves to be unearthed.

data.title: Fixure launches on Product Hunt to introduce Layer-5 Security Decision Intelligence, inviting security teams to public beta.
data.description: The public beta of Fixure is now available on Product Hunt for security teams, promoting a shift from simply reacting to alerts to making clear and justifiable decisions. The platform aims to assist security leaders and practitioners in transitioning towards making explainable and defensible choices. This launch provides an opportunity for the community to engage with Fixure's security decision intelligence tools. Interested individuals can access the beta version at the provided Product Hunt link.
